channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog poo, 9th June
item.description:
Lack of respect of dog owners

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lee High Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weed O/S number 5 Hubbard close Crayford, 9th June
item.description:
Overgrown weed O/S number 5 Hubbard close Crayford Resident advised it overgrown, and it is attracting bees so becoming quote dangerous for children. It is also almost covering footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches require prunning, 9th June
item.description:
The tree branches at 85, Oxhawth Crescent require prunning. They are ivergrown and people can hardly pass through there. This affects several orher trees on this road, not just this one. But this is where urgent attention is needed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 9th June
item.description:
Clothes, bedding,bags of rubbish outside Community hospice 33 Pickford Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Greenwich bags, 9th June
item.description:
It appears outside 146 Woolwich road SE 10 OLt green bags put out for waste collection but not collected due to non recyclable

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poo-tiful, 9th June
item.description:
Anyone for a poo-cnic? Oh yeah, please don’t mark it as ‘fixed’ until the issue has actually been resolved. I’m on a mission, I agree it took me a while to find my calling but here I am. See you tomorrow! 🥰🤗

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hickin Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burst water main opposite Red lion Lane, 9th June
item.description:
Been ongoing at least a week
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture packaging and a cupboard unit, 9th June
item.description:
In car parking area at Withens Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped behind number 1 Northumberland park, 9th June
item.description:
The landlord of number 1 Northumberland park has had a huge building maybe garage built at the back of the garden I use this alleyway all the time and they have left all this rubbish which has been here for a while now and they have no intention of getting rid of it, this is an obstruction right on this corner as cars people use this area PLEASE can you contact these owners who continually dump here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial Flytipping AGAIN, 9th June
item.description:
This business has yet again flytipped their commercial waste on the public highway. Their Planning Decision Notice states that all rubbish should be collected from the rear of the premises. Yet again they leave their waste at the front of the premises outside of their collection window and yet again it invites vermin and leave litter on the public highway. Given this business has already been reported several times and has an enforcement notice please follow up on this and put a stop to a problem that has continued to happen for more than 3 years by this irresponsible business. Your inaction is not resolving the issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Welcome to paradise! Poo paradise!, 9th June
item.description:
Okay, so I may have lost the plot ever so slightly. Wouldn’t poo though? Sorry, wouldn’t YOU though…?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hickin Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and food waste, 9th June
item.description:
Litter and food waste been dumped. Needs cleaning up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London

item.title: Anyone for poo?, 9th June
item.description:
You can have a poo…you can have a poo…everyone can have a poo!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hickin Close, Charlton

item.title: Dog poo on path next to playground, 9th June
item.description:
Dog poo on path next to playground Clapton Sq

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is the back on the shop on Bexley Road Erith number 94 they have built a long garage at the back and have dumped all their rubbish behind and have left it there, this area is used regularly as cars go through here and the refuse workers in bin days, 9th June
item.description:
This is the back of the shop on Bexley Road Erith number 94 they have built a huge garage type building at the back and continually dump their rubbish behind and have no intention of moving it this area is used regularly by cars passing through and the bin men on bin days it is absolutely disgusting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 207, Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bit loose slab, 9th June
item.description:
Slab in the picture is bit loose and moves when you stand on it, corner sticks out a little bit, trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45-65, Peckham Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Rubbish not in bins or picked up, 9th June
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Barnwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents use bin as their private, 9th June
item.description:
Constantly overflowing playground bin as residents deposit their house garbage here, food included. I have reported this to the council. Unacceptable situation. Attracts rats.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ambleside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
